title: dolichos brachypterus
intro: Dolichos brachypterus, also known as the Indian arkeophylla or horse gram, is a type of legume plant native to India and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and lowering cholesterol levels. Dolichos brachypterus can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
